info.title: Alan Perlis Quotes
info.description: This API provides random epigrams by Alan Perlis, a notable figure in computer science. Users can programmatically access a variety of his thought-provoking quotes to enhance their applications or for inspiration.

get.summary: Get a random Alan Perlis epigram
get.description: Returns a random quote/epigram by Alan Perlis, a notable figure in computer science.

200.description: Successful response with a random Alan Perlis quote

schema.example: A programming language is low level when its programs require attention to the irrelevant.

quote.example: A programming language is low level when its programs require attention to the irrelevant.

tags.name: Quotes
tags.description: Operations related to retrieving Alan Perlis quotes
